0.text: Fissure-based nodules measuring 11 mm and 3.5 mm in the superior segment of the left lower lobe, possibly intraparenchymal lymph nodes

1.text: Fissure-based nodule measuring 3 mm in the anterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Nodules measuring 2-3 mm in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

4.text: Two nodules measuring 5 mm and 6 mm in the middle lobe

5.text: Nodules measuring 2-3 mm in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe
